flows.title: Start the MCP server (stdio)
flows.summary: The `serve` command boots the stdio MCP server: it writes startup status, registers all tools, connects the stdio transport, opens the per-directory SQLite DB, then runs a background full index, file watcher, and conversation folder watcher under a per-project index lock.

stateChanges.trigger: writeStatus() at each startup phase and on index/watcher progress
stateChanges.description: Server writes a status file recording each boot phase (starting, tools registered, transport connected), indexing progress, and a final done/interrupted/error line.
Only one server instance per project directory acquires the index lock and performs indexing/watching; others run query-only.
Background startup index inserts/updates file and chunk rows (and vec/fts entries) for the project, prunes deleted files, and resolves imports/symbol refs.

flows.title: CLI: serve
flows.summary: Dispatches the `serve` subcommand: dynamically imports the server module (deferred so native-dep load failures are caught), writes diagnostics on load failure, then calls startServer() to run the stdio MCP server.

flows.title: CLI: init
flows.summary: Sets up mimirs for a project: runs setup (writes config, MCP entries, agent instruction files via runSetup), optionally prints an MCP snippet for unknown IDEs, then optionally indexes the project, writing progress to the status file.

stateChanges.item: setup files (config.json, MCP config, agent instructions)
stateChanges.description: Setup writes .mimirs/config.json, MCP server entries, and agent instruction blocks for the requested IDEs.

stateChanges.trigger: indexDirectory(dir, db, config, ...) when the user confirms indexing
stateChanges.description: When the user accepts the index prompt, the project is indexed and file/chunk rows are written to index.db.

flows.title: CLI: index
flows.summary: Indexes files in a directory. Opens the project DB, loads config (optionally overriding include patterns from --patterns), runs indexDirectory, and prints an indexed/skipped/pruned summary.

stateChanges.description: Indexes each matched file, inserting/updating file and chunk rows (and vec/fts entries via triggers), graph metadata, and symbol refs; prunes deleted files when running a full index.

flows.title: CLI: search
flows.summary: Runs a hybrid (vector + BM25) document search over the index and prints ranked file paths with snippet previews. Supports --top and --ext/--in/--exclude path filters.

stateChanges.description: Each search records a query_log row with the query text, result count, top score, top path, and duration for analytics.

flows.title: CLI: read
flows.summary: Runs a hybrid chunk search (searchChunks) and prints full chunk content with entity names. Supports --top, --threshold, --dir, and path filters.

stateChanges.description: Each chunk search records a query_log row for analytics.

flows.title: CLI: status
flows.summary: Opens the project DB and prints index stats: total files, total chunks, and last-indexed timestamp.

flows.title: CLI: remove
flows.summary: Removes a single file from the index by absolute path, deleting its file row and cascaded chunk/vec/fts rows.

stateChanges.description: Deletes the file's row; cascade and triggers remove its chunks, vector entries, and FTS entries.

flows.title: CLI: analytics
flows.summary: Aggregates the query_log over a look-back window (--days, default 30) and prints total queries, average results, average top score, zero-result rate, top searches, zero-result and low-relevance queries, plus a trend comparison vs the prior period.

flows.title: CLI: map
flows.summary: Generates a Mermaid project dependency graph from the stored import/export graph. Supports --focus to zoom into one file's neighborhood and --zoom file|directory.

flows.title: CLI: benchmark
flows.summary: Runs a search-quality benchmark from a queries file, prints a recall/MRR report, and exits non-zero if recall or MRR falls below the configured thresholds.

flows.title: CLI: benchmark-models
flows.summary: Compares multiple embedding models on the same queries: for each model it reconfigures the embedder, builds a throwaway temp index, runs the benchmark, and prints a comparison table plus a >5pp recall verdict against the baseline.

stateChanges.trigger: mkdirSync temp dir, index into it, then rmSync in finally
stateChanges.description: For each model a temp .rag-eval-<model> directory and DB is created, indexed, benchmarked, and deleted after the run.

flows.title: CLI: eval
flows.summary: Runs an A/B evaluation (with/without RAG) over eval tasks, prints a report, and optionally writes per-task traces to a JSON file with --out.

stateChanges.description: When --out is given, per-task evaluation traces are written to the specified JSON file.

flows.title: CLI: conversation
flows.summary: A subcommand group over conversation transcripts: `search` (index-on-demand then reciprocal-rank-fused vector + BM25 search of turns), `sessions` (list discovered sessions and their indexed turn counts), and `index` (index all discovered sessions into the DB).

stateChanges.description: The `index` subcommand (and on-demand re-index in `search`) parses transcript JSONL and inserts session, turn, and chunk rows (with vec/fts entries).

flows.title: CLI: checkpoint
flows.summary: A subcommand group over checkpoints: `create` (embed title+summary and insert a checkpoint row), `list` (most recent, optional --type filter), and `search` (semantic search over checkpoints).

stateChanges.description: The `create` subcommand embeds title+summary and inserts a new conversation_checkpoints row (with a vec_checkpoints entry).

flows.title: CLI: history
flows.summary: A subcommand group over git commit history: `index` (walk git log, embed and store commits), `search` (hybrid search of indexed commits with --author/--since filters), and `status` (commit count and last indexed commit).

stateChanges.description: The `index` subcommand walks git log and inserts git_commits and git_commit_files rows (with vec/fts entries).

flows.title: CLI: annotations
flows.summary: Lists persistent annotations stored in the DB, optionally filtered to a single file path with --path. Prints id, target file/symbol, author, note, and updated timestamp.

flows.title: CLI: session-context
flows.summary: Prints a session-start orientation summary: git uncommitted changes and recent commits, index stats, recent search gaps (zero-result/low-relevance queries), and annotations on git-modified files.

flows.title: CLI: doctor
flows.summary: Diagnoses MCP server startup issues by running a sequence of checks (Bun runtime, extension-capable SQLite, project dir, .mimirs writability, DB opens, sqlite-vec module, embedding module), printing any recent crash log and indexing status, and exiting non-zero on failure.

flows.title: CLI: cleanup
flows.summary: Removes all mimirs files from a project: the .mimirs/ directory, mimirs entries from MCP configs, agent instruction blocks/files, and the .mimirs/ entry from .gitignore. Prompts for confirmation unless -y is passed.

stateChanges.description: Deletes the .mimirs/ directory and strips mimirs entries from MCP configs, agent instruction files, and .gitignore; deletes files that become empty.

flows.title: CLI: demo
flows.summary: Runs an interactive feature demo: indexes the project, then demonstrates search, read_relevant, and search_symbols (listing mode, top symbols by reference count) against a fixed demo query, with colored terminal output.

stateChanges.description: The demo indexes the project as its first step so the subsequent search demos have data.

flows.title: Tool: search
flows.summary: MCP tool that runs a hybrid document search over the index and returns ranked file paths with snippet previews, a result/timing header, and a tip to call read_relevant. Supports top and extensions/dirs/excludeDirs filters.

stateChanges.description: Each search records a query_log row for analytics.

flows.title: Tool: read_relevant
flows.summary: MCP tool that runs a hybrid chunk search and returns the actual content of ranked chunks with exact line ranges, inlining any matching file/symbol annotations as [NOTE] blocks and a usages tip.

stateChanges.description: Each chunk search records a query_log row for analytics.

flows.title: Tool: search_symbols
flows.summary: MCP tool that finds symbol definitions by name (or lists all exports when symbol is omitted) from the symbol index, returning path, name, type, child/reference counts, and re-export status.

flows.title: Tool: write_relevant
flows.summary: MCP tool that suggests the best file and insertion point for new code or docs: it chunk-searches the content, picks the best-scoring chunk per file, and returns candidate locations with anchors.

stateChanges.description: write_relevant runs searchChunks under the hood, which records a query_log row.

flows.title: Tool: index_files
flows.summary: MCP tool that indexes a directory for semantic search. Without patterns it indexes from config and prunes deleted/excluded files; with patterns it refreshes only matching files without pruning. Reports indexed/skipped/pruned and honors the index lock (query-only fallback).

stateChanges.description: Inserts/updates file and chunk rows (with vec/fts entries), graph metadata, and symbol refs; prunes deleted files only on a full (no-patterns) run.

flows.title: Tool: index_status
flows.summary: MCP tool that returns the current index state for a project directory: total files, total chunks, and last-indexed timestamp.

flows.title: Tool: remove_file
flows.summary: MCP tool that removes a specific file from the index by absolute path, reporting whether the file was present.

stateChanges.description: Deletes the file's row; cascade and triggers remove its chunks, vector entries, and FTS entries.

flows.title: Tool: project_map
flows.summary: MCP tool that generates a project dependency map from the stored import/export graph. Supports focus (zoom into a file's neighborhood), zoom (file|directory), and format (text|json with fan-in/fan-out metrics).

flows.title: Tool: usages
flows.summary: MCP tool that finds every call site or reference to a symbol across indexed files (from the chunk/symbol-ref index), grouped by file with line numbers and matching snippets. Supports exact word-boundary matching.

flows.title: Tool: depends_on
flows.summary: MCP tool that lists the files a given file imports (its resolved dependencies) from the import graph.

flows.title: Tool: dependents
flows.summary: MCP tool that lists the files that import a given file (reverse dependencies / blast radius) from the import graph.

flows.title: Tool: impact
flows.summary: MCP tool that reports a symbol's transitive callers as a pruned call tree (symbol-level blast radius) plus the test files to run, walking the resolved symbol-ref graph. The printed tree is bounded by depth/budget and prunes ambient (high fan-in) callers, but a second count pass reports the true caller and file totals so the headline is honest.

flows.title: Tool: trace
flows.summary: MCP tool that shows how one symbol reaches another: the reachable call sub-graph from `from` to `to`, computed as forward-reachable-from-source intersected with backward-reachable-to-target, with branches that never reach the target pruned and the shortest path highlighted as a spine. Resolution is static, so a dynamic-dispatch hop ends a chain and is reported as a no-path frontier.

flows.title: Tool: callees
flows.summary: MCP tool that lists the functions/methods a symbol directly calls (one hop out), each resolved to its definition file:line via the static call graph. The forward complement of usages (callers). Dynamic dispatch (callbacks, interface->impl, DI) and calls into unindexed code are not resolved. Optional `file` disambiguates a name defined in several places.

flows.title: Tool: affected
flows.summary: MCP tool that, given changed files (or the git working-tree diff against HEAD by default), reports the test files that transitively import them - the tests to run for a change. Returns indexed changed files, the tests, and any changed files not in the index. Interactive counterpart of the affected CLI command.

flows.title: CLI: affected
flows.summary: CLI command that prints the test files affected by a set of changed files, by walking the transitive importer closure and keeping the tests. Reads file paths from arguments, from --stdin (e.g. piped `git diff --name-only`), or from `git diff --name-only HEAD` when none are given; supports --quiet (bare paths for piping) and --json.

flows.title: Tool: search_conversation
flows.summary: MCP tool that searches conversation history. It embeds the query, runs vector + BM25 over indexed turns, merges results by reciprocal-rank fusion (rrfFuse, deduped by turnId), and returns turns with timestamps, tools used, and referenced files. Optional sessionId scope.

flows.title: Tool: read_conversation
flows.summary: MCP tool that reads the full verbatim text of past conversation turns by session + turn selector (single turn with optional context padding, an inclusive from/to range, or the tail when no selector). Resolves the session (explicit or freshest), clamps to stored turn bounds via MAX(turn_index), and caps total characters. With includeToolOutput it re-parses the raw transcript to include tool results. The read counterpart to search_conversation.

flows.title: Tool: create_checkpoint
flows.summary: MCP tool that saves a checkpoint so future sessions know what was done. It resolves the current session and turn index, embeds title+summary, inserts a checkpoint row, and returns the new id with a hint to annotate noted files.

stateChanges.description: Inserts a new conversation_checkpoints row plus a vec_checkpoints embedding entry.

flows.title: Tool: list_checkpoints
flows.summary: MCP tool that lists conversation checkpoints, most recent first (cross-session by default), with optional sessionId and type filters and a limit.

flows.title: Tool: search_checkpoints
flows.summary: MCP tool that runs a semantic (vector) search over checkpoint titles and summaries, with optional type filter and limit, returning ranked checkpoints.

flows.title: Tool: annotate
flows.summary: MCP tool that attaches a persistent note to a file or symbol. It embeds the note, upserts the annotation (same path+symbol updates the existing note), and returns the annotation id. Notes later surface inline in read_relevant results.

stateChanges.description: Inserts or updates an annotations row (with fts/vec entries) keyed by path+symbol.

flows.title: Tool: get_annotations
flows.summary: MCP tool that retrieves persistent notes. With a path it returns all notes for that file; with a query it semantically searches across all annotations; with both it filters by path and ranks by relevance.

flows.title: Tool: delete_annotation
flows.summary: MCP tool that removes an annotation by id (obtained from get_annotations), reporting whether the annotation existed.

stateChanges.description: Deletes the annotation row by id (and its fts/vec entries) when it exists.

flows.title: Tool: search_analytics
flows.summary: MCP tool that reports search usage analytics over a look-back window (days): total queries, average results, average top score, zero-result rate, top searched terms, zero-result queries, and low-relevance queries — aggregated from query_log.

flows.title: Tool: git_context
flows.summary: MCP tool that shows git context for the working tree: uncommitted changes annotated with [indexed]/[not indexed] status, recent commits (since a ref, default HEAD~5), changed files, and an optional truncated diff. Supports files_only and include_diff.

flows.title: Tool: search_commits
flows.summary: MCP tool that semantically searches indexed git commit history. It embeds the query, runs vector + FTS over git_commits, merges with a fixed 0.7 hybrid weight, applies author/date/path filters and a threshold, and returns ranked commits. Requires git history to be indexed.

flows.title: Tool: file_history
flows.summary: MCP tool that returns the commit history for a specific file (suffix-matched path) from indexed git history, newest first, with optional since-date filter and a limit.

flows.title: Tool: server_info
flows.summary: MCP tool that shows the current server configuration: version, resolved project/db dirs, log level, index status, embedding model and dimension, key config values, and all currently connected databases with age/idle times.

flows.title: Tool: wiki
flows.summary: MCP tool that runs the wiki rebuild workflow. The command argument uses colon selectors (shape, prefetch, validate-discovery, discovery, write, validate-pages, eject, etc.) and is dispatched to runWikiRebuild, returning the workflow text or a formatted error.

stateChanges.description: Depending on the selector, the workflow writes prefetch metadata, discovery JSON, or generated wiki pages under wiki/.

flows.title: CLI: ping
flows.summary: Sends a ping over the drop-box command channel to the live index-lock-holding server and reports whether the channel answered, proving end-to-end connectivity to the running server.

flows.title: CLI: connect
flows.summary: Validates another repo's mimirs index and saves it as a persistent connection in .mimirs/config.json (optionally under an alias); with no repo argument it lists the connected repos and their freshness.

stateChanges.description: A new cross-repo connection is appended to the connectedRepos array in the project config so future sessions auto-attach it.

flows.title: CLI: disconnect
flows.summary: Removes a saved cross-repo connection from .mimirs/config.json, matched by repo path or alias.

stateChanges.trigger: removeConnectedRepo rewrites connectedRepos without the matched entry
stateChanges.description: The matched connection is dropped from the connectedRepos array in the project config.

flows.title: Tool: connect_repo
flows.summary: Opens another repo's mimirs index query-only for cross-repo search, validates schema and embedding-model compatibility, reports its size and freshness, and can persist the connection to config.

stateChanges.trigger: getDB(resolved) opens the foreign repo's index read-only
stateChanges.description: The foreign repo's index.db is opened query-only and registered as a connected database the server can route reads to.

pages.title: Start the MCP server
mustCover: stdio transport connected before slow startup work
DB preflight and permanent vs transient error handling
index lock gating background index and watchers
background full index then file watcher and conversation folder watcher

pages.title: CLI: serve
mustCover: dynamic import of the server module and why
diagnostics written on module load failure
outputs: server-error.log and status on load failure

pages.title: CLI: init
mustCover: runSetup writing config and IDE/MCP/instruction files

pages.title: CLI: search
mustCover: hybrid search over the index (vector kNN + BM25 combined by reciprocal-rank fusion)
ranked file output with snippet preview

pages.title: CLI: read
mustCover: hybrid chunk search (searchChunks: reciprocal-rank-fused vector + BM25)
full chunk content with entity names

pages.title: CLI: status
mustCover: getStatus returning files, chunks, last indexed

pages.title: CLI: remove
outputs: deleted file row and cascaded chunk/vec/fts rows

pages.title: CLI: conversation
mustCover: search subcommand with index-on-demand and reciprocal-rank fusion (rrfFuse)
sessions subcommand listing discovered sessions and indexed turn counts

pages.title: CLI: checkpoint
mustCover: create subcommand embedding title+summary and inserting a checkpoint

pages.title: CLI: history
mustCover: index subcommand walking git log into git_commits
status subcommand commit count and last commit
outputs: git_commits rows / commit search results / history stats

pages.title: CLI: session-context
mustCover: git uncommitted changes and recent commits

pages.title: CLI: doctor
mustCover: sequence of startup checks (Bun, extension-capable SQLite, dir, writability, DB open, sqlite-vec, embedding module)
printing recent crash log and error/interrupted status

pages.title: CLI: cleanup
mustCover: stripping mimirs from MCP configs and agent instruction files
outputs: deleted mimirs files and config entries

pages.title: CLI: demo
mustCover: search_symbols listing ranked by reference count

pages.title: Tool: search
mustCover: hybrid search via search(): vector kNN + BM25 combined by reciprocal-rank fusion (rrfFuse, default weight 0.5), robust to the two scorers' different scales
identifier-aware FTS: compound identifiers split (camelCase/snake_case) via the parts column, so 'depends' matches getDependsOn
outputs: ranked file paths with snippet previews

pages.title: Tool: read_relevant
mustCover: searchChunks: vector + BM25 combined by reciprocal-rank fusion (rrfFuse, default weight 0.5), threshold applied after fusion before re-rankers
identifier-aware FTS (camelCase/snake_case split via parts column)
inline [NOTE] annotation blocks for matching path/symbol
outputs: chunk content with line ranges and annotations

pages.title: Tool: search_symbols
mustCover: searchSymbols by name or list-all-exports mode

pages.title: Tool: write_relevant
mustCover: chunk search (searchChunks: reciprocal-rank-fused vector + BM25) then best-per-file selection

pages.title: Tool: index_files
mustCover: full index with prune vs patterns refresh without prune

pages.title: Tool: index_status
mustCover: getStatus returning files, chunks, last indexed

pages.title: Tool: remove_file
outputs: deleted file row and cascaded chunk/vec/fts rows

pages.title: Tool: usages
mustCover: grouping by file with line numbers and snippets

pages.title: Tool: depends_on
outputs: list of imported files with import sources

pages.title: Tool: dependents
outputs: list of importer files with import sources

pages.title: Tool: impact
mustCover: transitive caller walk over the symbol-ref graph
symbol resolution + ambiguity handling via getCallablesByName
ambient-prune by per-export inbound count (not name fan-in)
honest total vs shown counts when depth/budget bound the tree
Tests to run: precise (reference the symbol) vs broad (import affected files)

pages.title: Tool: trace
mustCover: reachable sub-graph = forward-from-source intersected with backward-to-target
pruning branches that do not reach the target
no-path frontier report and the static-resolution limitation

pages.title: Tool: callees
mustCover: directCallees walks one hop out over the static call graph
resolving each callee to its definition file:line
the leaf / dynamic-dispatch / unindexed result message
file disambiguation when a name is defined in multiple places
outputs: list of directly-called symbols with file:line

pages.title: Tool: affected
mustCover: defaulting to the git working-tree diff against HEAD when files omitted
NUL-separated (-z) git diff parsing for paths with spaces
reporting changed-indexed, tests-to-run, and not-indexed sets

pages.title: CLI: affected
mustCover: input modes: file args, --stdin, git diff auto-detect
transitiveImporters closure filtered to test files

pages.title: Tool: search_conversation
mustCover: embed query then vector + BM25 over turns
outputs: ranked conversation turns with tools/files referenced

pages.title: Tool: read_conversation
mustCover: session resolution (explicit arg or freshest transcript)
turn selectors: single turn + context padding, from/to range, or tail default
bounds via MAX(turn_index); out-of-range turn is an error not a silent clamp
maxChars cap with oversized turns truncated and marked
includeToolOutput re-parses the raw transcript for full tool results

pages.title: Tool: create_checkpoint
mustCover: resolving current session and turn index
annotate hint when files are involved

pages.title: Tool: search_checkpoints
mustCover: embed query then vector search over checkpoints

pages.title: Tool: git_context
mustCover: uncommitted changes annotated with index status
changed files and optional truncated diff

pages.title: Tool: search_commits
mustCover: embed query then vector + FTS with 0.7 hybrid weight

pages.title: Tool: server_info
mustCover: resolved project/db dirs and log level

pages.title: Tool: wiki
outputs: wiki files written by selected commands

pages.title: Architecture
mustCover: the two runtime entry styles: per-invocation CLI vs long-running stdio MCP server
shared core (RagDB, indexer, hybrid search — vector + BM25 fused by reciprocal-rank fusion, embeddings) used by both

pages.title: Data Model
mustCover: SQLite DB at .mimirs/index.db (location overridable via RAG_DB_DIR)
core tables: files, chunks (incl. parts column for identifier-aware FTS), vec_chunks, fts_chunks(snippet, parts) and the sync triggers
in-place parts migration: drop triggers, backfill parts, recreate FTS + triggers, rebuild the FTS index (no re-embedding)
conversation tables: sessions, turns, chunks, checkpoints

pages.title: Module Map
mustCover: top-level src directories and their roles (cli, server, tools, db, indexing, search, embeddings, conversation, git, graph, config, wiki, utils)
import boundaries: tools/CLI depend on db/search/indexing; db split into per-domain store modules re-exported from db/index.ts
embeddings as a shared singleton used by indexing and search

pages.title: Runtime Lifecycle
mustCover: boot: status writes, tool registration, transport connect
ready: DB preflight, index lock, background index then watcher
handle: tool calls served over stdio via getDB cache
shutdown: signal/stdin handlers, writeExitStatus, DB close
permanent vs transient startup error handling

pages.title: Configuration
mustCover: RagConfigSchema knobs and DEFAULT_CONFIG (include/exclude/generated, chunk sizes, hybridWeight default 0.5, searchTopK, benchmark thresholds, embedding model/dim/pooling/dtype)
config.json written with defaults on first load
embedding model/dim/pooling/dtype precedence: config.json (embeddingModel/embeddingDim/embeddingPooling/embeddingDtype) over defaults, passed to configureEmbedder

pages.title: Hybrid search ranking
mustCover: how vector and keyword results are fused into one ranking
which rows the cosine relevance threshold filters and which bypass it
the boosts applied after fusion and where each is computed
what callers configure (topK, extensions/dirs filters) versus what is fixed

pages.title: Embedding model loading and caching
mustCover: the pinned default model (revision + sha256) and checksum verification with corrupt-cache purge
the embedder singleton lifecycle: configure, lazy load, reset
token windowing and merged embeddings for inputs past the model token limit
thread-count default and why it stays conservative

pages.title: Call graph construction and traversal
mustCover: how the call graph is built from the database and cached, and what invalidates the cache
symbol resolution including ambiguity between same-named definitions
traversal pruning: ambient fan-in cutoff and node count cap
static-resolution limits: dynamic dispatch breaks chains and how results say so

pages.title: CLI: ping
mustCover: sending the ping command via sendCommand over the drop-box channel with a 5s timeout
readLockHolderPid to find the live server, and the case where no server holds the lock
interpreting the result: channel answered (pid/version) vs a DropboxError or version without the command channel

pages.title: CLI: connect
mustCover: addConnectedRepo validating the target index and appending to connectedRepos in .mimirs/config.json
optional --alias and how the alias is later usable as a directory argument
no-argument mode listing connected repos with freshness
why the CLI being sessionless means connect = persist rather than open

pages.title: CLI: disconnect
mustCover: removeConnectedRepo matching by path or alias and rewriting connectedRepos
the result when no matching connection exists

pages.title: Tool: connect_repo
mustCover: opening the foreign repo query-only via getDB and reporting files/chunks/last_indexed/model
rejecting a directory with no .mimirs/index.db, and the primary-project short-circuit
freshness reporting from readLockHolderPid + isPidAlive (live server vs frozen index)
optional persist + alias saving the connection via addConnectedRepo
the readonly-write guidance: writes must run from that repo's own server

pages.title: Drop-box command channel
mustCover: request/result file protocol: CLI drops .mimirs/commands/<id>.json, the lock-holding server writes <id>.result.json, rename-into-place avoids partial reads
the closed command enum (ping, index.git, index.conversation, index.files) and per-command zod arg validation as the trust boundary
only the index-lock holder consumes; query-only servers never start the dropbox
consumer serial queue, fs.watch best-effort rescan with poll fallback, startup drain and REQUEST_TTL_MS expiry of orphans
producer withIndexAccess: run locally when it can take the lock, else delegate to the holder via sendCommand
